fileNodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
fileNodes.summary: Keep-a-Changelog history of the τ kernel from v0.0.1-alpha through the unreleased v0.1.2-pre, documenting the M0–M6 milestones, the v0.1.1 post-audit refactor, and the v0.1.2 full removal of CI/CD tooling for a pure-local project.

fileNodes.name: CLAUDE.md
fileNodes.summary: Operational rulebook for the TauGo project: doctrine (what the τ kernel is and is not), the 7 forbidden anti-patterns guarded by tests, the strict 4-layer Clean Architecture, the I1–I5 invariants and three dimensions, the five Refus cases, essential commands, and coding/editorial conventions.

fileNodes.name: PRD.md
fileNodes.summary: Canonical V0.3 product requirements document for the τ kernel, organized in five blocks: strategic framing, operationalized theory (τ operator, three dimensions, five invariants), target architecture and data model, the 8-step dispatch algorithm and adaptive calibration, execution discipline, and the V1 roadmap with success criteria.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Project entry-point documentation presenting the τ kernel doctrine and anti-goals, quick-start commands, the 4-layer architecture, usage examples (tau decide, tau calibrate, Go embedding of Kernel.Decide, fuzz/E2E), the v0.1.0→v0.1.2-pre status, invariant statuses, and a documentation index.

fileNodes.name: 0009-types-erreurs-typees.md
fileNodes.summary: Architecture decision record establishing typed error values (DispatchError, RefusError, CalibrationError) and errors.Is/As-compatible sentinels in the populated internal/errors package, with consequences and rejected alternatives.

fileNodes.name: 0012-golden-corpus-calibration-schema.md
fileNodes.summary: Architecture decision record resolving the C1-01 debt by regenerating the golden calibration corpus to the CorpusEntry schema via cmd/generate-corpus --scored, re-pinning its canonical hash, and re-enabling CLI corpus validation in cmd/tau/calibrate.go.

fileNodes.name: .golangci.yml
fileNodes.summary: golangci-lint configuration pinning 24 linters (FibGo-aligned) with run, linters, linters-settings, and issues sections enforcing complexity limits and gochecknoglobals.

fileNodes.name: Makefile
fileNodes.summary: Local build/test orchestration with 12 targets (build, test, coverage, benchmark, lint, fuzz, calibrate, cross-compile) for the pure-local validation workflow after CI/CD removal.

fileNodes.name: doc.go
fileNodes.summary: Package documentation for the generate-corpus command, describing the synthetic calibration-corpus generator binary.

fileNodes.name: synthetic-corpus-120-seed42-balanced.jsonl
fileNodes.summary: Golden JSONL fixture of 120 synthetic exchanges (seed 42, balanced distribution) used as the frozen reference corpus for byte-reproducibility tests.

fileNodes.name: decide_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for the runDecide handler verifying exit codes for valid/invalid/empty stdin and asserting that emitted output is valid JSON with a populated regime.

fileNodes.name: main.go
fileNodes.summary: Entry point for the tau binary: dispatches the decide and calibrate subcommands, prints usage, and runs the JSON-in/JSON-out Decide flow via app.NewDispatcher.

fileNodes.name: main_test.go
fileNodes.summary: End-to-end tests that build the tau binary via TestMain and exercise the compiled CLI for decide (Deterministe/Probabiliste) and calibrate (valid byte-reproducible profile) flows.

fileNodes.name: runmain_test.go
fileNodes.summary: In-process tests for runMain covering the no-args usage banner, unknown command exit 2, version, decide-via-stdin, and calibrate-with-valid-args exit 0 paths.

fileNodes.name: 0001-clean-architecture-4-layers.md
fileNodes.summary: ADR establishing the strict 4-layer Clean Architecture (app / tau / orchestration / bridge) with sealed dependency directions guarded by arch_test.go.

fileNodes.name: 0002-go-1.25-toolchain.md
fileNodes.summary: ADR pinning the Go 1.25+ toolchain (FibGo-aligned) and recording the rationale and rejected alternatives.

fileNodes.name: 0003-llm-client-injection.md
fileNodes.summary: ADR mandating LLM client injection through a narrow interface, keeping concrete LLM imports out of the tau domain (anti-pattern #6) and clarifying the dimensions/bridge-llm boundary.

fileNodes.name: 0004-agentmeshkafka-empirical-bridge.md
fileNodes.summary: ADR adopting AgentMeshKafka as the empirical bridge with a two-regime design: active FileAdapter contingency branch (M4) and a deferred KafkaAdapter (M5+), under an architectural guard.

fileNodes.name: 0005-agentmeshkafka-dto.md
fileNodes.summary: ADR requiring the AgentMeshKafka adapter to return a neutral DTO rather than a domain type, preserving Clean Architecture layer isolation.

fileNodes.name: 0006-types-valeur-transverses.md
fileNodes.summary: ADR introducing the internal/thresholds value-type package as a downward-sealed cross-cutting type shared across layers without importing any taugo package.

fileNodes.name: 0007-hysteresis-v1-simplifiee.md
fileNodes.summary: ADR adopting a simplified V1 hystÃ©rÃ¨se without LastRegime memory, deferring stateful regime smoothing to a later version.

fileNodes.name: 0008-trace-ventilee-scores-dimensions.md
fileNodes.summary: ADR splitting the Decision trace into per-dimension scores (D-SENS / D-AUTORITÃ‰ / D-INVARIANT) populated by the dispatcher, replacing the single TauScore proxy read by I3/I4 evaluators.

fileNodes.name: 0010-retrait-ci-cd-pure-local.md
fileNodes.summary: ADR-0010 deciding to remove all CI/CD tooling (GitHub Actions workflows, CI-only Make targets) and treat TauGo as a pure-local project validated only via local make test/lint/fuzz.

fileNodes.name: calibration.md
fileNodes.summary: Specification of the V1 adaptive calibration algorithm: deterministic grid search over thresholds with milli-unit encoding, agreement scoring, conservative tie-break, and byte-identical canonical serialization.

fileNodes.name: dispatch.md
fileNodes.summary: Specification of the V1 Ï„ dispatch algorithm describing the 8 non-arbitrary pipeline steps (frontiÃ¨re, garde ontologique D-AUTORITÃ‰, pÃ©remption, scores trois dimensions, cohÃ©rence I4, composite Ï„_score, hystÃ©rÃ¨se, invariants) mapped to Go files and diagnostics.

fileNodes.name: drift.md
fileNodes.summary: Specification of the V1 drift detection algorithm: the five PRD criteria, comparison logic, return structure, and V1 fingerprints (CPU, LLM model, corpus) feeding the dispatcher's profile-staleness guard.

fileNodes.name: PRDPlanning-m0-m6.md
fileNodes.summary: Archived master implementation plan for milestones M0-M6, covering agent-team orchestration strategy, milestone dependencies, and bite-sized task breakdowns for the V1 build.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Index of the docs/archive directory listing historical execution plans and audit documents.

fileNodes.name: 2026-05-24-AUDIT-v0.1.0-to-v0.1.1.md
fileNodes.summary: Consolidated v0.1.0 audit identifying P0/P1/P2/P3 observations, Clean Architecture sealing violations, anti-pattern guard gaps, and an actionable purge inventory that drove the v0.1.1 refactor.

fileNodes.name: 2026-05-24-AUDITPlan-v0.1.1.md
fileNodes.summary: Execution plan for the v0.1.0 to v0.1.1 refactor organizing 42 tasks (T-001..T-042) across six lots with a dependency DAG, ADR creation annex, and release acceptance criteria.

fileNodes.name: 00_bootstrap.md
fileNodes.summary: Bootstrap orchestrator note for the v0.1.2-pre multi-agent Go audit: target state, toolchain availability/fallbacks, 16-package inventory, and the 3-wave agent orchestration plan.

fileNodes.name: 01_conformite_tau.md
fileNodes.summary: Audit axis SA1 assessing conformance to the Ï„ spec, reporting one MAJEUR finding plus cleanliness notes against the doctrine and decision pipeline.

fileNodes.name: 02_invariants_epistemique.md
fileNodes.summary: Audit axis SA2 covering invariants I1-I5 and epistemic rigor, with fuzz execution evidence, severity-classified findings, and a synthesis of the seven guarded anti-patterns.

fileNodes.name: 03_concurrence.md
fileNodes.summary: Audit axis SA3 on concurrency, with a methodological caveat that the race detector was not run (no CGO on Windows), first-principles synthesis, and a concurrency verdict.

fileNodes.name: 04_performance.md
fileNodes.summary: Audit axis SA4 on performance, presenting findings against the benchmark targets for the Ï„ core and calibration packages plus sandbox hygiene notes.

fileNodes.name: 05_idiomatique.md
fileNodes.summary: Audit axis SA5 on Go idiomaticity, reporting one MAJEUR finding plus observations on code style and the limits of the audit scope.

fileNodes.name: 06_architecture_tests.md
fileNodes.summary: Audit axis SA6 on architecture and tests, validating the 7 sealing rules, coverage, tagged test suites, repository layout/ADR/go.mod analysis, and CI state under ADR-0010.

fileNodes.name: CONVENTIONS.md
fileNodes.summary: Shared conventions for the multi-agent Go audit: language/style, severity scale, finding format, and Windows/PowerShell/Go 1.26.3 execution constraints.

fileNodes.name: RAPPORT_FINAL.md
fileNodes.summary: Final report of the v0.1.2-pre multi-agent Go audit consolidating verdicts across the six axes (SA1-SA6), scientific validity of I1-I5, regression check against v0.1.1, and a prioritized P0-P4 action plan.

fileNodes.name: 2026-05-23-M1-dispatcher-stub-llm.md
fileNodes.summary: Archived M1 sub-plan detailing the minimal dispatcher and deterministic LLM stub: immutable Decision.Trace, dispatcher implementation, app-level LLM injection, the tau decide command, and E2E tests.

fileNodes.name: 2026-05-23-M2-dimensions-gardes.md
fileNodes.summary: Archived M2 sub-plan for the three dimensions (D-SENS, D-AUTORITÃ‰, D-INVARIANT) and the ontological/I4 guards, including dimension probes, the weighted composite score, calibration profile, and atomic thresholds.

fileNodes.name: 2026-05-24-M3-invariants-fuzz.md
fileNodes.summary: Archived M3 sub-plan implementing the five invariants I1-I5 as fuzz targets, with per-invariant theory notes, helper APIs, the FuzzI1..FuzzI5 targets, and the dispatcher's invariant-evaluation step.

fileNodes.name: 2026-05-24-M4-agentmeshkafka-bridge.md
fileNodes.summary: Archived M4 sub-plan for the AgentMeshKafka adapter and empirical I4 campaign: neutral DTO design, narrow Adapter interface, JSONL FileAdapter, the StreamAsTauExchanges converter, and synthetic corpus generation.

fileNodes.name: 2026-05-24-M5-calibration-drift.md
fileNodes.summary: Archived M5 sub-plan for adaptive calibration and drift detection, covering the grid-search calibrator, drift criteria, fingerprints, and profile staleness handling.

fileNodes.name: 2026-05-24-M6-release-v0.1.0.md
fileNodes.summary: Archived M6 sub-plan for documentation, French typography pass, and the v0.1.0 release, closing out the M0-M6 milestone sequence.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Index of the archived M0-M6 detailed milestone plans within docs/archive/plans-m0-m6.

fileNodes.name: I4-regime.md
fileNodes.summary: Records the regime-selection decision for the empirical I4 campaign (M4), justifying the chosen regime and the conditions that would trigger a switch to Regime A.

fileNodes.name: I4-report.md
fileNodes.summary: Empirical campaign report for invariant I4 (M4), covering methodology with the balanced profile, raw results, interpretation, identified limits, and campaign verdict.

fileNodes.name: M2-sample-decisions.md
fileNodes.summary: Reference catalogue of 10 sample Ï„ decisions (f01-f10) exercising every Regime outcome (Refus hors frontiÃ¨re, Deterministe, Probabiliste) plus the I3/I4 refusal paths, with active thresholds and traces.

fileNodes.name: case-study-bfsi.md
fileNodes.summary: Fictional BFSI case study walking Ï„ step-by-step through an interbank transfer under delegation, illustrating FrontierCheck, the D-AUTORITÃ‰ ontological lock (I3), and derived variants.

fileNodes.name: fuzz-summary.md
fileNodes.summary: M3 fuzz campaign report for invariants I1-I5, documenting methodology, per-target results and properties, a real bug found by FuzzI5, and V1 limits.

fileNodes.name: unmodeled.md
fileNodes.summary: Living registry of unmodeled observations (anti-patron #4 guard), logging M4 campaign findings such as missing Context signals and the frontier heuristic rejecting part of the corpus.

fileNodes.name: 03-operateur-tau.md
fileNodes.summary: Theory note defining the opÃ©rateur Ï„ as a cross-reference to monograph chap. III.8.3, with its TauGo encoding, three exploitable properties, and the frontiÃ¨re de validitÃ© boundary.

fileNodes.name: 04-dimensions.md
fileNodes.summary: Theory note (chap. III.8.4) describing the three dimensions D-SENS, D-AUTORITÃ‰, and D-INVARIANT, their poles, probes, ontological asymmetry, the I4 coherence constraint, and Go input-type encoding.

fileNodes.name: 05-invariants.md
fileNodes.summary: Theory note (chap. III.8.5) presenting the five invariants I1-I5 with canonical verbatim, derivations, refutation conditions, executable reformulations, epistemic status, and fuzz targets.

fileNodes.name: 06-conditions-validite.md
fileNodes.summary: Theory note (chap. III.8.6) on the three validity conditions C1-C3 (real agentic frontiÃ¨re, D-AUTORITÃ‰ as limiting factor, dated and revisable model) that delimit Ï„'s operating zone.

fileNodes.name: 07-anti-patrons.md
fileNodes.summary: Theory note (chap. III.8.7) cataloguing usage anti-patrons AP#1-AP#4 (predictive, out-of-frontier, atemporal, closed-world) with their TauGo guards and additional engineering guards.

fileNodes.name: main.go
fileNodes.summary: Runnable quickstart example that builds a dispatcher via app.NewDispatcher and calls Decide on three typed cases, printing the Regime, ventilated D-SENS/D-AUTORITÃ‰/D-INVARIANT scores, and JSON trace.

fileNodes.name: go.mod
fileNodes.summary: Go module declaration for github.com/agbruneau/taugo, pinning the Go version with no external dependencies (pure stdlib kernel).

fileNodes.name: anti_patterns_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Guard tests enforcing TauGo anti-patrons: no exported predictive API (AST walk), I3 date_revision respected, and unmodeled observations always reported.

fileNodes.name: agentmesh_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests the AgentMeshKafka-to-Ï„ bridge: ToTauExchange mapping (nominal, no-attestation, discovery-mode fallback, attestation preservation) and StreamAsTauExchanges context-cancel draining, round-trip, and error propagation.

fileNodes.name: app.go
fileNodes.summary: Application lifecycle layer: NewDispatcher wires the default calibration profile and selected LLM backend (stub by default) into an orchestration dispatcher.

fileNodes.name: app_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests app.NewDispatcher: default profile loading, perimption detection via a simulated clock, real-backend panic, and confirmation that the default LLM is the deterministic stub.

fileNodes.name: doc.go
fileNodes.summary: Package documentation stub for the internal/app lifecycle and dependency-injection layer.

fileNodes.name: select_llm_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests the selectLLM backend resolver: stub provider, empty provider defaulting to stub, unknown provider returning a typed DispatchError, and the real backend reported as not implemented.

fileNodes.name: adapter.go
fileNodes.summary: Defines the neutral AgentMeshKafka DTOs (Exchange, Principal, Capability, Attestation) and the Adapter streaming interface consumed by the app bridge layer.

fileNodes.name: adapter_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests the AgentMeshKafka DTOs and Adapter contract: interface shape, field presence, Stream signature, JSON round-trip, zero-value and omitted-attestation marshalling, and FileAdapter conformance.

fileNodes.name: classifier.go
fileNodes.summary: Classifies empirical decisions against the I4 coherence constraint and aggregates campaign statistics (sensitivity/specificity, false positives/negatives, unmodeled counts) for the I4 report.

fileNodes.name: classifier_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests the empirical I4 classifier and summary: ClassifyI4 buckets, unmodeled counting, aggregate stats, and JSON omitempty behaviour of nil sensitivity/specificity.

fileNodes.name: doc.go
fileNodes.summary: Package documentation for the agentmeshkafka bridge, declaring its role as a neutral-DTO adapter for AgentMeshKafka traces and the Clean Architecture sealing rule forbidding imports of internal/tau and internal/orchestration (ADR-0005).

fileNodes.name: empirical_i4_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Empirical I4 coherence campaign test that streams a JSONL corpus through the FileAdapter and dispatcher, computes sensitivity/specificity, and writes a reproducible JSON report with corpus SHA-256 fingerprint.

fileNodes.name: file_adapter.go
fileNodes.summary: File-backed mock adapter that streams JSONL fixtures as AgentMeshExchange DTOs over a channel, with context cancellation and idempotent Close; stands in for a real Kafka adapter (deferred to M4-bis).

fileNodes.name: file_adapter_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for FileAdapter covering golden JSONL reads, context cancellation stopping the stream, idempotent Close, malformed-line resilience, and missing-file constructor errors.

fileNodes.name: empirical-i4-results.json
fileNodes.summary: Recorded empirical I4 campaign report fixture capturing corpus path/SHA-256, profile version, sensitivity, specificity, per-class stats, timestamp and total decision count.

fileNodes.name: golden-3-malformed.jsonl
fileNodes.summary: JSONL test fixture containing a deliberately malformed line used to exercise the FileAdapter error-reporting-and-continue path.

fileNodes.name: golden-3.jsonl
fileNodes.summary: Golden JSONL fixture of three well-formed AgentMeshExchange records consumed by FileAdapter streaming tests.

fileNodes.name: client.go
fileNodes.summary: Defines the narrow LLM Client interface (Fingerprint + Interpret) that TauGo consumes; no concrete LLM is embedded, isolating non-determinism from the tau core (PRD Â§12.2).

fileNodes.name: doc.go
fileNodes.summary: Package documentation for the llm bridge describing the abstract Client boundary that confines LLM non-determinism away from internal/tau.

fileNodes.name: stub.go
fileNodes.summary: Deterministic Stub implementation of the LLM Client used by default in tests, returning a fixed fingerprint and a bounded [0,1] interpretation score derived from intent length.

fileNodes.name: stub_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests asserting the Stub's stable Fingerprint and that Interpret is deterministic and bounded within [0,1] across sample intents.

fileNodes.name: calibrate_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests for the calibration pipeline: grid-search best-thresholds selection, determinism, agreement non-regression, V1 weight preservation, canonical marshalling (sorted keys, round-trip, byte-identical, valid JSON), and corpus regime validation/migration.

fileNodes.name: doc.go
fileNodes.summary: Package documentation for the calibration package describing profile generation, drift detection, and reproducible serialization responsibilities.

fileNodes.name: drift.go
fileNodes.summary: Drift detection that flags a profile as stale when CPU, LLM, or corpus fingerprints mismatch the environment or the date_revision has passed, plus helpers to fingerprint the CPU and a corpus file (anti-patron #3 guard).

fileNodes.name: drift_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests for drift detection covering no-drift, CPU/LLM/corpus fingerprint mismatches, expired date_revision, multiple simultaneous criteria, empty-fingerprint skipping, and corpus/CPU fingerprint stability.

fileNodes.name: profile.go
fileNodes.summary: Defines the Weights and Profile data structures and DefaultProfile, the checked-in default calibration profile pinning thresholds, weights, monograph version, and a future date_revision injected by app.NewDispatcher.

fileNodes.name: profile_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests asserting DefaultProfile's fields are non-empty, date_revision is after creation and at least six months ahead, weights sum to one per dimension, and threshold ordering invariants hold.

fileNodes.name: store.go
fileNodes.summary: Filesystem profile store that saves profiles byte-canonically, maintains a current pointer (symlink with copy fallback), loads by id/version or current, and exports a file's SHA-256.

fileNodes.name: store_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests for the profile Store covering save/load round-trip, byte-identical repeated saves, current pointer correctness, overwrite-on-update, corrupt/missing JSON errors, and forced mkdir/write/refresh failures.

fileNodes.name: store_unix_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Unix-tagged test verifying that Save creates a symlink for current.json on platforms supporting symlinks.

fileNodes.name: store_windows_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Windows-tagged test verifying that Save falls back to a real file copy of current.json when symlink creation is unavailable.

fileNodes.name: drift-corpus-a.jsonl
fileNodes.summary: JSONL corpus fixture A used to verify FingerprintCorpus produces distinct, stable SHA-256 digests for differing inputs.

fileNodes.name: drift-corpus-b.jsonl
fileNodes.summary: JSONL corpus fixture B paired with corpus A to confirm distinct corpora yield distinct fingerprints in drift tests.

fileNodes.name: mini-corpus.jsonl
fileNodes.summary: Thirty-entry labeled mini-corpus fixture driving calibration grid-search, determinism, and agreement tests.

fileNodes.name: thresholds_atomic_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Verifies AtomicThresholds roundtrip fidelity, the ordering invariant (panic on Deterministe â‰¤ Probabiliste), SetTuning behaviour, and race-free concurrent reads.

fileNodes.name: weights.go
fileNodes.summary: Defines CalibrateWeights, the V1 dimension-weight calibration entry point, which is a deterministic pass-through over the base profile weights via a pluggable WeightHook strategy.

fileNodes.name: weights_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Confirms CalibrateWeights is a V1 pass-through, preserves the sum-to-one weight constraint, allows a custom WeightHook strategy, and reports the current strategy as V1.

fileNodes.name: decision_invariants_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Guards the cross-cutting Decision invariants: every Decision is traced, a Refus always carries a diagnostic, and the returned Trace is immutable against caller mutation.

fileNodes.name: dispatcher.go
fileNodes.summary: Core orchestration engine implementing Kernel.Decide as the 8-step pseudo-algorithm: frontier check, D-AUTORITÃ‰ ontological lock, profile expiry guard, ventilated D-SENS/D-INVARIANT scoring, weighted regime classification, and I1-I5 invariant evaluation, always returning a fully traced Decision.

fileNodes.name: dispatcher_expiry_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Covers step 3 of Decide: an expired profile (today > date_revision) yields Refus, a fresh profile proceeds, and a zero DateRevision or nil profile skips the expiry guard.

fileNodes.name: dispatcher_invariants_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Covers step 8 of Decide: I1-I5 invariant evaluation leaves the Trace empty when no violation occurs, enriches it on violation, and never mutates the classified Regime.

fileNodes.name: dispatcher_profile_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Verifies the Decision echoes the profile version and DateRevision and that the dispatcher applies profile-supplied dimension weights, contrasting default-weight versus profile-weight outcomes.

fileNodes.name: dispatcher_scores_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Confirms the Trace carries the ventilated D-SENS/D-AUTORITÃ‰/D-INVARIANT scores and that EvaluateI3/EvaluateI4 read those ventilated scores (ADR-0008) rather than the proxy TauScore.

fileNodes.name: dispatcher_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Primary dispatcher test suite with shared Exchange builders and a fakeLLM stub, covering the Deterministe, Probabiliste, and hysteresis-defaults-to-Deterministe regime outcomes of Decide.

fileNodes.name: doc.go
fileNodes.summary: Package documentation stub for the orchestration package housing the dispatcher and Decision types.

fileNodes.name: guards_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests the first-rank refusal guards: D-AUTORITÃ‰ ontological lock (Refus without AttestationInstitutionnelle, pass with attestation) and I4 coherence (incoherent s<Î¸_sens âˆ§ iâ‰¥Î¸_inv refused, coherent combination accepted).

fileNodes.name: thresholds.go
fileNodes.summary: Provides DefaultThresholds, the canonical default decision-threshold set, aliasing the transverse internal/thresholds value type (ADR-0006) for the orchestration layer.

fileNodes.name: diagnostics.go
fileNodes.summary: Declares the canonical Refus diagnostic constants (DiagFrontiereFranchie, DiagVerrouOntologique, DiagPeremptionProfile, DiagIncoherenceI4) referenced across the kernel.

fileNodes.name: dauthority.go
fileNodes.summary: Computes the D-AUTORITÃ‰ dimension score [0,1] â€” the reach of the delegation chain â€” by weighting four probes (chain depth, cross-org, human anchor, dynamic resolution) and reporting a ventilated Score with its probe breakdown.

fileNodes.name: dauthority_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Validates D-AUTORITÃ‰ scoring: boundedness in [0,1], short chains scoring below long chains, probe weights summing to one, populated probe map, chain-depth saturation, and empty-org handling.

fileNodes.name: dinvariant.go
fileNodes.summary: Computes the D-INVARIANT dimension score [0,1] â€” support for integration invariants â€” by weighting four probes (event registry, idempotency, capability mediation, enumerated plan) into a ventilated Score with its probe breakdown.

fileNodes.name: dinvariant_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Validates D-INVARIANT scoring: boundedness in [0,1], frozen support scoring below traced support, probe weights summing to one, populated probe map, explicit enumerated-plan and dynamic-discovery capability-mediation cases.

fileNodes.name: doc.go
fileNodes.summary: Package documentation for the dimensions package implementing the three orthogonal Ï„ dimension scorers D-SENS, D-AUTORITÃ‰, and D-INVARIANT.

fileNodes.name: dsens.go
fileNodes.summary: Computes the D-SENS dimension score [0,1] â€” the locus where meaning is fixed â€” by weighting four probes (contract, runtime resolve, capability discovery, reasoner intent), the last consulting the injected LLM client through its narrow interface.

fileNodes.name: dsens_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Validates D-SENS scoring: boundedness in [0,1], static exchanges scoring below dynamic ones, probe weights summing to one, populated probe map, empty-intent handling, and graceful behaviour when the LLM client returns an error.

fileNodes.name: score.go
fileNodes.summary: Aliases tau.Score into the dimensions package to break the import cycle ADR-0008 would otherwise create, and provides the shared clamp01 [0,1] bounding helper used by all three dimension scorers.

fileNodes.name: score_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for the clamp01 helper in the dimensions package, covering below-zero, above-one, boundary and NaN inputs to guarantee D-SENS/D-AUTORITE/D-INVARIANT scores stay in [0,1].

fileNodes.name: doc.go
fileNodes.summary: Package documentation for internal/tau, the core layer of the opÃ©rateur Ï„ kernel that hosts Exchange, Decision and the FrontierCheck guard without importing orchestration or bridge.

fileNodes.name: frontier.go
fileNodes.summary: Defines FrontierCheck, the first-rank guard encoding the four classic frontiÃ¨re conditions; Inside() returns true only when none are met, gating whether the kernel may proceed (anti-patron #2).

fileNodes.name: frontier_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Guards anti-patron #2 by asserting FrontierCheck.Inside() holds only when all four classic conditions are violated and refuses when any single condition is met.

fileNodes.name: doc.go
fileNodes.summary: Package documentation for internal/tau/invariants, which encodes the five invariants I1-I5 of chap. III.8.5 and their evaluation against a Decision.

fileNodes.name: evaluator.go
fileNodes.summary: Aggregates the five invariant evaluators into a single Statuses struct, exposing Status.String, Statuses.AnyViolated, Statuses.Summary and the EvaluateInvariants entry point that runs I1-I5 over an Exchange/Decision pair.

fileNodes.name: evaluator_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests the invariant Statuses aggregator: zero-value AnyViolated, ordered short Summary, Status.String mapping and that EvaluateInvariants never panics on a zero Exchange/Decision.

fileNodes.name: fuzz_targets_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Native Go fuzz targets FuzzI1..FuzzI5 plus the makeFuzzExchange/fuzzRefTime helpers, exercising each invariant under randomized inputs to refute property violations (chap. III.8.7).

fileNodes.name: i1_conservation_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests invariant I1: identity-trace conservation holds, breaks on Exchange-ID drift, EvaluateI1 holds on non-Refus, is not-applicable on Refus frontiÃ¨re and violated on trace drift.

fileNodes.name: i2_irreductibility_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests invariant I2: Residu is non-empty for a dynamic Exchange, removing all residual elements loses the frontier, and EvaluateI2 holds, is not-applicable on Refus frontiÃ¨re, and yields zero rÃ©sidu inside the frontier.

fileNodes.name: i3_authority_asymmetry.go
fileNodes.summary: Encodes invariant I3 (D-AUTORITE asymmetry, Searle 1995): IsProfileExpired and the clock-injectable EvaluateI3WithClock enforce ontological refus when authority is blocked without AttestationInstitutionnelle or the calibration profile is pÃ©rimÃ©.

fileNodes.name: i3_authority_asymmetry_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Tests invariant I3 across ten cases: profile-expiry detection, nominal hold, violated-when-expired-but-not-refused, expiry/auth-block refusal held, other-Refus not-applicable and Probabiliste below auth-block.

fileNodes.name: i4_coherence.go
fileNodes.summary: Encodes invariant I4 (i â‰ˆ pendant âŸ¹ s â‰ˆ pendant): IsIncoherent detects the silent rupture from ventilated D-SENS/D-INVARIANT scores and EvaluateI4 reports held/violated against a Decision.

fileNodes.name: i5_composition.go
fileNodes.summary: Encodes invariant I5 (composed pile inherits the conjunction; M(Ï€) â‰¥ max(|Aáµ¢|)): Aggregate builds the sorted deduplicated union of blind spots and BoundsHold checks the magnitude bounds.

fileNodes.name: operator.go
fileNodes.summary: Sole public entry point of the Ï„ operator core, declaring the Kernel.Decide interface plus the canonical types Exchange, Decision, Trace, Score, Regime, DiscoveryMode and the FrontierCheck derivation. Any change here risks an API rupture (Module sensible).

fileNodes.name: operator_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests covering String, MarshalJSON and UnmarshalJSON for the Regime and DiscoveryMode enums (string + legacy int round-trips) and the omitempty behaviour of the ventilated Trace scores.

fileNodes.name: builders.go
fileNodes.summary: Functional-options test helper exposing BuildExchange(opts...) plus With* options (WithID, WithDiscoveryMode, WithAttestation, WithContext, etc.) to construct tau.Exchange fixtures without ad-hoc literals.

fileNodes.name: builders_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests verifying BuildExchange default values and that the full set of With* options are applied correctly to the produced Exchange.

fileNodes.name: thresholds.go
fileNodes.summary: Defines the transverse value type Thresholds (Deterministe, Probabiliste, AuthBlock, SensCoherence, InvCoherence, HysteresisGap) with an Ordered() invariant check; a leaf package depending on no other taugo package (ADR-0006).

fileNodes.name: thresholds_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests covering the Thresholds zero value, all-fields assignment, and the Ordered() ordering invariant.

fileNodes.name: typography-fr.py
fileNodes.summary: Standalone CLI script applying French typography (non-breaking spaces before : ; ? !, guillemets Â« â€¦ Â») to Markdown files while preserving code blocks and inline-code/URL segments; supports a --dry-run mode.

fileNodes.name: agentmeshkafka_test.go
fileNodes.summary: End-to-end test driving the full AgentMeshKafka pipeline: file adapter -> StreamAsTauExchanges -> app.NewDispatcher.Decide, covering topic-filtered, unfiltered and malformed-corpus scenarios.

fileNodes.name: doc.go
fileNodes.summary: Package documentation stub for the test/e2e package describing the end-to-end test suite scope.

fileNodes.name: e2e_trace_test.go
fileNodes.summary: End-to-end test asserting that Kernel.Decide produces a ventilated Trace (non-nil, positive D-SENS / D-AUTORITÃ‰ / D-INVARIANT scores) and that a custom profile's weights influence the decision differently from the default profile.

fileNodes.name: .gitkeep
fileNodes.summary: Empty placeholder file keeping the tests/calibration directory tracked in git.

fileNodes.name: generator.go
fileNodes.summary: Deterministic golden-corpus generator: builds balanced batches of synthetic Exchange records across τ regimes (refus frontier/I3/I4, deterministe, probabiliste, hysteresis) and emits them as annotated or scored CorpusEntry JSONL.

fileNodes.name: main.go
fileNodes.summary: CLI entry point for the generate-corpus tool; parses flags (count, seed, profile, output, annotate, scored) and dispatches to the appropriate Generator method.

fileNodes.name: main_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Test suite for the generate-corpus tool covering byte-reproducibility, frozen golden hashes, distribution balance, annotation correctness, and CLI exit-code behavior.

fileNodes.name: calibrate.go
fileNodes.summary: Implements the `tau calibrate` CLI subcommand: parses flags, loads and validates the corpus via calibration.LoadCorpus, runs calibration, and writes the canonical profile, mapping corpus errors to exit codes.

fileNodes.name: calibrate_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Test suite for the `tau calibrate` subcommand verifying flag validation, exit codes, corpus loading errors, legacy schema migration, and date-revision parsing.

fileNodes.name: calibrate.go
fileNodes.summary: Core calibration logic: defines CorpusEntry with schema migration and validation, loads JSONL corpora, simulates regime agreement to tune thresholds, and produces a byte-canonical serialized profile.

fileNodes.name: thresholds_atomic.go
fileNodes.summary: Lock-free atomic threshold store for the six τ decision thresholds, encoding float64 values as millis in atomic ints for concurrent-safe reads and tuning.

fileNodes.name: errors.go
fileNodes.summary: Typed error layer defining DispatchError, RefusError, and CalibrationError plus the diagnostic sentinels (ErrFrontiereFranchie, ErrPeremptionProfile, ErrIncoherenceI4, ErrVerrouOntologique) used across the kernel.

fileNodes.name: errors_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Test suite verifying error-message formatting, Unwrap propagation, and errors.Is sentinel matching for the three typed error kinds.

fileNodes.name: agentmesh.go
fileNodes.summary: App-layer bridge wiring: converts AgentMeshKafka exchanges into neutral τ Exchange values and streams them through a context-cancellable fan pipeline.

fileNodes.name: arch_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Architecture-enforcement test suite that walks the package AST to keep the Clean Architecture sealing rules intact, forbidding tau/* from importing orchestration or bridge and banning concrete LLM imports outside app/ and bridge/llm/.

fileNodes.name: decide_bench_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Micro-benchmark suite for the dispatcher Decide pipeline across deterministic, probabilistic and refusal exchange paths, reporting allocations per decision.

fileNodes.name: dimensions_bench_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Micro-benchmark suite measuring the scoring functions for the three orthogonal dimensions D-SENS, D-AUTHORITY and D-INVARIANT.

fileNodes.name: i1_conservation.go
fileNodes.summary: Production implementation of invariant I1 (conservation): τ moves the fixation instant without altering the quantity, so the decision must preserve the exchange's content magnitude.

fileNodes.name: i2_irreductibility.go
fileNodes.summary: Production implementation of invariant I2 (irreducibility): computes the migrating residue and proves it is non-empty and not offline-rewireable, so removing it would push the exchange outside the τ frontier.

fileNodes.name: i4_coherence_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Test suite for invariant I4 (constraint coherence): table-driven incoherence checks plus EvaluateI4 cases covering nominal, I4-refusal, missing-ventilated-scores and unrelated-refusal scenarios.

fileNodes.name: i5_composition_test.go
fileNodes.summary: Test and benchmark suite for invariant I5 (conjunctive composition): validates Aggregate's stable sorted blind-spot union with deduplication and the M(π) lower/upper bounds over composed stacks.

fileNodes.name: calibration_determinism_test.go
fileNodes.summary: End-to-end test suite building the tau binary to assert byte-deterministic calibration output, a fixed golden-corpus profile hash, and that an expired profile triggers an ontological refusal.

fileNodes.name: golden-corpus.jsonl
fileNodes.summary: Golden calibration corpus of 170 CorpusEntry records with real ventilated scores and pinned SHA-256, feeding the deterministic calibration tests (ADR-0012).
